global.description: The ad features a vibrant red background with geometric shapes and bold text.
global.main_message: Promoting a streaming service with new content updates.

elements.label: Red background
elements.description: A solid red background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A large pink rectangle and an oval shape are centered, creating a modern and abstract visual focus.

elements.label: Small circles
elements.description: Two small pink circles are positioned near the bottom left, adding a playful touch to the design.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: Another pink rectangle is layered within the main subject, contributing to the abstract composition.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom center with the text 'Learn more' invites user interaction.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small circular icon labeled 'UGC' is placed at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Main headline
elements.description: The bold text 'Binge starts now' is prominently displayed in the center, conveying urgency and excitement.
elements.text_content: Binge starts now New hits every week

elements.label: PulsePlay logo
elements.description: The 'PulsePlay' logo is positioned at the top, featuring a modern font that stands out against the red background.

elements.label: Subheadline text
elements.description: The text 'New hits every week' is placed below the main headline, providing additional context in a smaller font.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small icon labeled 'UGC' appears at the top left, indicating the presence of user-generated content.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern and abstract, bold headline and call to action
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, the main subject is in the middle, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Binge starts now, New hits every week, PulsePlay, Learn more, UGC
